title: InterpUpdates — Experiment Dashboard
subtitle: Interpretable fine-tuning updates: localizing & removing spurious-correlation shortcuts in LLMs

experiments.title: C+/C− max-activating neuron heatmaps
experiments.summary: Token-level activation heatmaps for the top C+ and C− attribution neurons (masks on). Surfaces the qualitative meaning of each bucket: in the zxq (construct) regime the model builds dedicated cue-detector neurons split across C+ (active) and C− (suppressed); in the bad (amplify) regime there is no dedicated detector — the shortcut rides generic sentiment-readout neurons. Tabs per model × correlate.
